$comment: Project-scoped Claude Code settings. The version-controlled architecture surface (rules/skills/agents/hooks here, settings.json itself) — per-machine state lives in .claude/settings.local.json (gitignored). Hooks wire the .claude/hooks/*.sh enforcement scripts. Worktree config locks in the parallel-session workflow (.claude/rules/parallel-sessions.md). Authoritative external: https://code.claude.com/docs/en/hooks-guide + https://code.claude.com/docs/en/worktrees.
